bead.title: Stage 3.3: CRITICAL Svelte 5 compatibility verification
bead.description: Gate bead for Stage 3. Verify that bits-ui, lucide-svelte, mode-watcher, and Houdini all have Svelte 5 releases available. Create new file cli/internal/server/frontend/STACK.md listing each library, its Svelte 5 version status, and the fallback decision for any incompatible library. If any library is Svelte-4-only, either document the fallback (downgrade scaffold to Svelte 4, or use alternative library). See docs/plan-svelte-migration.md Stage 3 bead #29.
bead.acceptance: (1) STACK.md exists and lists: bits-ui, lucide-svelte, mode-watcher, Houdini + their latest Svelte 5 version status. (2) For each library: version number + whether Svelte 5 supported + fallback plan if not. (3) MANUAL: reviewer reads STACK.md and can confirm that the Stage 3 scaffold will work with Svelte 5 OR confirm the fallback is acceptable.
